Title: Category - Facet Filtering
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category with facets on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Verify facet panel is visible in sidebar
[ACT] Click on a facet value (e.g., Brand)
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify products are filtered; result count updates
[ACT] Apply an additional facet value from another group
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify combined AND filtering — result set narrower
Assertions:
[DOM] Facet panel visible with multiple facet groups
[DOM] Clicking a facet value filters the product list
[MATH] Multiple facets combine with AND logic — result count <= each individual filter count
[DOM] Result count label updates after each filter action
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner >5s after filter click; facet panel not rendering; result count unchanged after filter; console TypeError

Title: Category - Price Range Filter
Preconditions: Products with varying prices exist in category
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Locate price range filter (slider or min/max inputs)
[ACT] Set minimum price value
[ACT] Set maximum price value
[ACT] Apply or confirm the price range filter
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify all displayed products fall within the specified range
Assertions:
[DOM] Price range slider or input fields present
[MATH] All displayed product prices are within the set min/max range
[DOM] Products outside price range are not shown
[DOM] Result count updates to reflect filtered set
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on price filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Price filter controls not rendering; products outside range still visible; result count unchanged; console TypeError

Title: Category - Clear Filters
Preconditions: Filters applied to a category page
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply multiple filters (e.g., facet + price range)
[WAIT] Wait for filtered results to load
[ACT] Click 'Clear all' or 'Reset filters' button
[WAIT] Wait for full product list to restore
[ASSERT] Verify all filters are cleared and full list is shown
Assertions:
[DOM] All filter chips removed from chip bar
[DOM] Full unfiltered product list restored
[DOM] Filter sidebar UI reset — no values selected
[STATE] URL cleaned of filter parameters
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on reset request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Reset button not visible; filters remain after reset; products not restored; URL still contains filter params; console TypeError

Title: Category - Pagination
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with 20+ products on {{FRONT_URL}}
[SCROLL] Scroll to pagination controls
[ASSERT] Verify pagination controls are visible
[ACT] Click page 2
[WAIT] Wait for new products to load
[ASSERT] Verify new product set is displayed
[ACT] Click Previous button
[WAIT] Wait for page 1 to reload
[ASSERT] Verify return to first page products
Assertions:
[DOM] Pagination controls visible at bottom of product list
[DOM] Page 2 shows different products from page 1
[DOM] Previous button returns to page 1 product set
[MATH] Total product count consistent across pages
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on pagination request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Pagination controls not rendering; same products on page 2; Previous not navigating back; console TypeError

Title: Category - Products Per Page
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Locate 'per page' or items-per-page dropdown
[ACT] Change 'per page' value (e.g., select 24)
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify product count matches selected value
Assertions:
[DOM] Per-page selector visible with multiple options
[MATH] Visible product card count matches selected per-page value
[STATE] URL or state updates to reflect new per-page setting
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on per-page change request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Per-page selector not rendering; product count unchanged after change; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Facet Filter Chip Display
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Verify facet panel is visible
[ACT] Click on a facet value (e.g., Brand: HP)
[WAIT] Wait for chip bar to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip appears with correct filter label
[ASSERT] Verify close (×) button is present on the chip
[ASSERT] Verify product count updates
Assertions:
[DOM] Chip appears in chip bar with correct filter label
[DOM] Close (×) button visible on chip
[MATH] Product count updates after chip applied
[STATE] URL contains filter parameter matching chip value
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Chip not appearing after filter click; chip label incorrect; close button absent; product count not updating; URL missing filter param; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Show in stock)
Preconditions: Category page with stock filter available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Toggle 'Show in stock' checkbox to ON
[WAIT] Wait for chip bar to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip labeled 'Show in stock' appears
[ACT] Click close button on 'Show in stock' chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip is removed and only this filter was cleared
[ASSERT] Verify any other active filters are preserved
Assertions:
[DOM] Chip labeled 'Show in stock' appears when checkbox is toggled ON
[STATE] Chip disappears when checkbox toggled OFF or close button clicked
[STATE] Only 'Show in stock' filter removed; other filters preserved
[MATH] Product count updates on each toggle
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Chip not appearing when checkbox toggled; chip removal also removes other filters; product count unchanged; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Purchased before)
Preconditions: Category page with stock filter; user has purchase history
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}} as authenticated user
[ACT] Toggle 'Purchased before' checkbox to ON
[WAIT] Wait for chip bar to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip labeled 'Purchased before' appears
[ASSERT] Verify product count updates to prior purchases
[ACT] Click close button on 'Purchased before' chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to restore
[ASSERT] Verify chip removed; filter state syncs with unchecked checkbox
Assertions:
[DOM] Chip appears for 'Purchased before' when toggled
[STATE] Checkbox reflects chip state (checked ↔ chip present)
[MATH] Product count reflects filtered set
[STATE] Removing chip unchecks the checkbox
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Chip not appearing for authenticated user; chip and checkbox state out of sync; product count unchanged; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Available at branches)
Preconditions: Category page with branch selection enabled
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with branch filter on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Select one or more branches in 'Available at branches'
[WAIT] Wait for chip bar to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip appears showing branch count (e.g., 'Branches (2)')
[ACT] Click close button on the branch chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to restore
[ASSERT] Verify chip removed; all selected branches cleared; product count restored
Assertions:
[DOM] Chip shows selected branch count
[STATE] Closing chip clears all selected branches simultaneously
[MATH] Product count updates after branch selection and after removal
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Branch chip not appearing; chip count not matching selected branches; chip removal only clears one branch; console TypeError

Title: Reset Filters - Combined Facet + Checkbox Reset
Preconditions: Category page with multiple filter types available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply a facet filter (e.g., Brand: HP)
[WAIT] Wait for chip to appear
[ACT] Toggle 'Show in stock' checkbox to ON
[WAIT] Wait for second chip to appear
[ASSERT] Verify both filter chips are present
[ACT] Click 'Reset filters' button
[WAIT] Wait for all filters to clear
[ASSERT] Verify ALL chips removed; all checkboxes unchecked; full product list restored
Assertions:
[DOM] All chips removed from chip bar after reset
[STATE] All checkboxes unchecked after reset
[STATE] URL cleaned — no filter parameters remain
[MATH] Full unfiltered product count restored
[DOM] 'Reset filters' button disappears when no filters active
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on reset request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Any chip remaining after reset; any checkbox still checked after reset; URL still has filter params; product count not fully restored; console TypeError

Title: Reset Filters - Zero Results State
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply filters until 0 products are shown
[WAIT] Wait for empty state UI
[ASSERT] Verify 'No results' message is displayed
[ASSERT] Verify 'Reset filters' button is prominently visible
[ACT] Click 'Reset filters'
[WAIT] Wait for full product list to restore
[ASSERT] Verify product list restored; all filters cleared
Assertions:
[DOM] 'No results' / empty state message displayed when 0 products match
[DOM] 'Reset filters' button visible and prominent below no-results message
[MATH] Full product count restored after reset
[STATE] All filter chips and checkboxes cleared
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on reset request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: No-results message not showing; Reset button missing from empty state; products not restoring after reset; console TypeError

Title: Reset Filters - Category Page Context Preserved
Assertions:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page (e.g., {{FRONT_URL}}/printers)
[ACT] Apply multiple filters
[WAIT] Wait for filtered results
[ACT] Click 'Reset filters' button
[WAIT] Wait for full category products to restore
[ASSERT] Verify still on same category page (not redirected to /catalog)
[ASSERT] Verify category-specific products are shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NAV] URL still contains category path after reset (not redirected to /catalog)
[DOM] Category heading unchanged after reset
[MATH] Full category product count restored
[STATE] No filter chips or params in URL
Failure_Signals:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on reset request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Cleanup: Reset redirects to /catalog instead of staying on category; category products not restored; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Individual Close vs Reset All
Preconditions: Category page with multiple filters available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply 3 or more filters (mix of facet and checkbox)
[WAIT] Wait for all chips to appear
[ACT] Click the × close button on ONE chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify only that one filter was removed; others preserved
[ACT] Click × on a second chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify only that second filter removed
[ACT] Click 'Reset filters' for remaining filters
[ASSERT] Verify all remaining filters cleared
Assertions:
[STATE] Individual × button removes exactly one filter; all others preserved
[MATH] Product count updates after each individual close
[STATE] 'Reset filters' button clears all remaining filters in one action
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on each filter removal
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Closing one chip removes multiple filters; product count not updating after individual close; Reset not clearing all remaining; console TypeError

Title: Filters - Browser Back/Forward Navigation
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply filter A
[WAIT] Wait for chip and URL param
[ACT] Apply filter B
[WAIT] Wait for chip and URL param for filter B
[KEY] Press browser Back button
[WAIT] Wait for filter B to be removed
[ASSERT] Verify filter B chip is gone; filter A chip remains
[KEY] Press browser Forward button
[WAIT] Wait for filter B to be restored
[ASSERT] Verify filter B chip reappears
Assertions:
[STATE] Browser back removes the most recently applied filter
[STATE] Browser forward restores the filter
[STATE] Chips sync correctly with browser history navigation
[STATE] URL params match chip state at each step
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on history navigation
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Back button removes all filters instead of just the last; chips not syncing with URL state after history navigation; console TypeError

Title: Filters - Page Refresh Preserves State
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply multiple filters
[WAIT] Wait for chips and URL params to be set
[KEY] Press F5 (or Ctrl+R) to refresh the page
[WAIT] Wait for page to reload
[ASSERT] Verify filter chips render correctly after reload
[ASSERT] Verify checkboxes are in correct checked state
[ASSERT] Verify 'Reset filters' button works after reload
Assertions:
[STATE] Filter chips present after page refresh (state persisted via URL params)
[STATE] Checkboxes reflect correct checked state after reload
[DOM] Reset button functional after refresh
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on page reload
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Chips not rendering after refresh; checkboxes losing state after refresh; Reset not working after refresh; console TypeError

Title: Filters - Multi-select Within Facet Group
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with multi-value facets on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Select 2 or more values within the same facet group (e.g., Brand: HP + Epson)
[WAIT] Wait for chips to appear
[ASSERT] Verify separate chip for each selected value
[ASSERT] Verify facet group header shows count (e.g., 'Brand (2)')
[ACT] Click × close button on one of the chips
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify only that value removed; other value in same facet preserved
Assertions:
[DOM] Individual chips per facet value (not one combined chip)
[DOM] Facet group header shows selected count (e.g., 'Brand (2)')
[STATE] Removing one chip does not remove other values in same facet group
[MATH] Product count updates after each chip change
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on multi-select filter requests
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Chips not appearing for each selected value; facet header not showing count; closing one chip removes all values in group; console TypeError

Title: Facet Filter Badge - Size xs Renders Legibly
Preconditions: Category with faceted filters and products available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with facets on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply a facet filter (e.g., Brand)
[WAIT] Wait for filter chip with badge to appear
[ASSERT] Locate the badge element on the filter chip
[ASSERT] Verify badge is readable and visually distinct
Assertions:
[DOM] Badge renders at xs size (smaller than sm variant)
[DOM] Badge text is legible — not clipped or overflowing container
[DOM] Badge has sufficient visual contrast against background
[DOM] Badge shape and padding appear correct at xs size
Failure_Signals: Badge text clipped or overflowing; badge not visible against background; badge absent from chip; console TypeError

Title: Facet Filter Badge - Double-Digit Count Uses Correct Padding
Preconditions: Category with many filter values available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with many filterable values on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply 10 or more values from the same facet group
[WAIT] Wait for facet header badge to update
[ASSERT] Verify badge shows double-digit count correctly
Assertions:
[DOM] Badge shows double-digit count (e.g., '10', '12')
[DOM] Badge width expands to fit double-digit number (dynamic px-1 padding)
[DOM] Count not clipped or truncated
[DOM] Badge proportionally correct at double-digit count
Failure_Signals: Badge truncating double-digit count; badge overflow at 10+; count not matching applied filters; console TypeError

Title: Facet Filter Badge - WCAG Contrast at xs Size
Preconditions: Category with facets; DevTools or accessibility checker available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with facets on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply a filter to display a filter chip with badge
[WAIT] Wait for chip with badge to render
[ACT] Open browser DevTools Accessibility panel or contrast checker
[ASSERT] Measure badge text contrast ratio against badge background
Assertions:
[DOM] Badge text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 against badge background (WCAG AA for normal text)
[DOM] Contrast maintained at xs badge size despite reduced padding
[DOM] Badge meets WCAG 2.1 Level AA criterion 1.4.3
Failure_Signals: Contrast ratio below 4.5:1; badge failing WCAG AA; DevTools flagging color contrast issue; console TypeError
